title: Judge Blocks Pentagon Move to Halt Anthropic Tools Amid Legal Fight
description: A federal judge has handed an early legal victory to artificial intelligence firm Anthropic in its dispute with the Pentagon. In a ruling issued Thursday, U.S. District Judge Rita Lin determined that directives from President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordering agencies to immediately stop using Anthropic’s technology cannot be enforced for now.
content:
A federal judge has handed an early legal victory to artificial intelligence firm Anthropic in its dispute with the Pentagon.

description: Christian Barker (Bark) and David Chaboki (Shibo), co-founders of Doginal Dogs and hosts on the Crypto Spaces Network, have generated millions of impressions with AI-focused content exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence, blockchain, and next-generation investing.

title: AI Breakthrough From Google Exposes Divide in Memory Chip Stocks
description: A two-day selloff in memory-chip stocks is revealing a split in the artificial intelligence trade, as Google touts a breakthrough that analysts say may curb demand for certain types of storage while leaving others largely unscathed.
content:

description: As artificial intelligence increasingly influences the editorial and media sectors, websites are creating rules to govern its use.

title: Paul Mastoridis: How to Lead Digital Transformation Inside Pharma
description: Many pharmaceutical companies are investing heavily in digital tools, artificial intelligence (AI), and connected health platforms in an effort to modernize how therapies are developed and delivered. These investments promise faster evidence generation, closer engagement with physicians and patients, and new streams of real-world data that can inform clinical decisions. title: Firmus’ Oliver Curtis set for green light to run ASX-listed company
description: The convicted insider trader has been given informal clearance by the exchange to stay on the board after the artificial intelligence firm’s blockbuster IPO.
content:
Firmus co-founder Oliver Curtis has been informally cleared to oversee and run a publicly listed company despite his criminal record, paving the way for him to lead his $6 billion artificial intelligence business to the ASX this year.
